requirements.title: Homepage loads and exposes primary navigation
acceptanceCriteria: Visitor can navigate from homepage to products
requirements.description: Public homepage should communicate Aperca's value proposition and allow visitors to continue into the products catalog.

requirements.title: Products catalog supports discovery and product detail navigation
acceptanceCriteria: Visitor can open the products catalog
Visitor can search for a known product
Visitor can open a product detail page from the catalog
requirements.description: Product discovery should work from the public products catalog without requiring authentication.

requirements.title: Contact page exposes the public inquiry form
acceptanceCriteria: Visitor can open the contact page
General contact submission starts disabled before required fields are filled
requirements.description: Users should be able to access the contact form safely without the framework submitting live contact data during automation.
